review_title: Fast, visible and simple. So easy to use — why don’t more companies use it? Perfect on-the-go app. Download now and simplify your day!
description: Fast, visible and simple So simple to use. Why don’t more companies use it ?? Great on the go app download now
author: justin F.
pros: So simple to use. Why don’t more companies use it ??
cons: Noting to fault it’s flexible and user friendly
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Simple to use but could improve in a few areas
description: Overall, it’s been a decent experience using Leave Dates. It covers the basic functionality well and is easy to get used to, even for someone new. That said, there are a few small things that could be improved to make it smoother, especially around editing or adjusting leave once it’s selected. Still, for day-to-day use, it gets the job done without much hassle.
author: Sanket T.
pros: The leave date selection is pretty straightforward and doesn’t take much time to figure out. I like that it clearly shows the selected dates and avoids confusion, especially when applying for multiple days. It works well for basic leave tracking and does what it’s supposed to with simple things.
cons: Sometimes the date selection feels a bit limited, especially if you need to make quick changes or adjust ranges. Also, it would be better if there was more flexibility or clearer visibility when overlapping leaves or holidays are involved. It’s not a major issue, but it can slow things down a bit.

review_title: Leave Dates
description: Positive, but with a few negative comments! :)
author: Penny B.
pros: Easy to navigate and user friendly. However, I am slightly disappointed with the report data. :(
cons: Reports not having enough options and would prefer dates in number format (ie 01/01/2024).

review_title: Best Leave Management System We’ve Used
description: Our overall experience has been excellent. We moved from a competitor and the transition was smooth and well worth it. The platform is reliable, easy to use, and has simplified leave management across the business. Both managers and employees genuinely like using it, which says a lot. It’s rare to introduce a new system and have such universal buy-in, but Leave Dates has delivered on all fronts.
author: Jack W.
pros: The UI is exceptionally clean and intuitive. Both employees and managers picked it up immediately with no training required. The user experience is modern, straightforward, and makes booking and approving leave effortless. Since switching from our previous provider, adoption has been seamless and feedback across the team has been overwhelmingly positive.
cons: Honestly, I haven’t been able to fault it. It does exactly what we need it to do, and it does it very well.

review_title: “Exceptional Leave Management Tool – Highly Recommended!”
description: My overall experience with Leave Dates has been excellent. The platform is very reliable and makes leave management extremely simple and efficient. It has significantly improved the way we handle employee leave requests and approvals. The system is easy to use, fast, and well-designed. Even new users can quickly understand how to use it without any confusion. I would definitely recommend Leave Dates to any organization looking for a smart, efficient, and modern leave management solution.
author: Krishna P.
pros: Extremely user-friendly and intuitive interface Makes leave management fast, smooth, and completely hassle-free Excellent performance with no delays or issues Very well-organized dashboard for tracking leaves and approvals Saves a lot of time and reduces manual work significantly Great notification system that keeps everything updated Easy for both employees and managers to use without training
cons: Honestly, I haven’t faced any major issues so far Everything works very smoothly, just minor enhancements can be added in the future
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Clean interface
description: My overall experience with Leave Dates has been smooth and efficient. The system makes it easy to apply for leave, view available balances, and track approval status. The interface is user-friendly, allowing quick selection of dates without confusion. Notifications and updates are timely, which helps in planning better.
author: sarika P.
pros: Clean interface, easy setup, and great calendar overview. Simple and intuitive, makes managing team leave effortless.
cons: Limited integrations and reporting features could be more detailed Leave Dates makes managing team leave refreshingly simple. The calendar view is clear and intuitive, and getting the team set up took no time at all. That said, integrations are limited and the reporting features could be more detailed — useful additions for growing teams.

review_title: Amazing applicaation
description: It greatly simplifies leave management for both employees and management, improving transparency, reducing manual work, and ensuring smooth, efficient coordination across the organization.
author: Jahanvi J.
pros: It is very helpful for both management and employees, making leave management simple, efficient, and easy to handle.....
cons: It provides frequent, real-time updates that keep both employees and management constantly informed about leave status. This ensures faster decision-making, reduces delays, improves planning, and maintains accuracy across the organization. With instant visibility and seamless tracking, it creates a more responsive, reliable, and efficient leave management experience for everyone involved.

review_title: Smooth and Reliable Leave Dates Experience
description: My overall experience with the Leave Dates feature has been smooth and reliable. The functionality works as expected, allowing users to select and manage leave dates without issues. The interface is clear and easy to use, and the process feels consistent across different scenarios. However, there is still some room for improvement in handling edge cases and ensuring complete accuracy in all conditions.
author: Jishang J.
pros: What I liked most about the Leave Dates app is its simple and intuitive interface, which makes it easy to view, manage, and plan leaves without confusion.
cons: Limited flexibility in selecting or editing leave dates Confusing UI/UX when choosing multiple or non-consecutive dates Lack of clear validation or error messages Slow or unresponsive date selection in some cases No easy way to view or compare selected leave dates before submission

review_title: Efficient, Visual, and User-Friendly Leave Tracking
description: It has completely automated our leave tracking, replacing messy spreadsheets. The process is transparent, user-friendly, and has significantly reduced administrative workload for everyone involved.
author: Umesh D.
pros: The visual wall chart is excellent for tracking team availability. It’s highly intuitive, and the calendar integration ensures everyone stays updated effortlessly.
cons: The web could be faster and more feature rich. Also, adding more custom filters for reporting would improve the experience for larger teams.

review_title: Easy and Efficient Leave Management Tool
description: Overall, Leave Dates has streamlined our leave management process and improved transparency within the team. It saves time and reduces confusion.
author: Upadhyay A.
pros: Leave Dates is simple and intuitive, making it easy to request and track time off. The approval workflow is smooth, and notifications keep everyone updated. I especially like the clear calendar view, which helps avoid scheduling conflicts.
cons: The reporting features could be more detailed, and the mobile experience sometimes feels limited compared to the desktop version.

review_title: Simple, Reliable, and Easy Leave Management for Teams
description: Overall, my experience with Leave Dates has been very positive. It’s reliable, easy to use, and has made managing employee leave much more organized and transparent. The system saves time, improves team visibility, and reduces admin effort, while support has been responsive whenever needed. It’s a solid solution that works well for everyday leave and staff management.
author: Hitesh R.
pros: Leave Dates is very easy to use, with almost no learning curve — the team picked it up quickly without training. Managing employees and staff leave is straightforward, and the shared calendar makes team collaboration and planning simple. Reporting is clear and useful, giving a quick overview of leave balances and absences. The system feels secure and reliable, which gives confidence when handling employee data.
cons: There aren’t many downsides, but One area for improvement would be more flexibility around leave types at the employee department level. Being able to assign or customize leave types based on departments would make the system even more powerful for organizations with different policies across teams. Other than that, the platform works smoothly and meets most day-to-day needs well.

review_title: Goodbye Spreadsheets, Hello Leave Dates
description: We used to struggle to keep track of staff annual leave, and the process was very manual and time-consuming. Leave Dates has really simplified everything — from staff requesting leave to managers approving it.
author: Dan L.
pros: Saves so much time and really easy to use Leave Dates has made tracking staff leave incredibly simple. Our team finds it very easy to request time off and track how many days they have remaining The daily email reminders showing who is off each day are really helpful The support team is also excellent—responsive, helpful, and open to suggestions
cons: Honestly, there’s very little to dislike about Leave Dates If you genuinely enjoy wasting time trawling through multiple spreadsheets, manually adding formulas, or chasing staff for updates, then Leave Dates probably isn’t for you. But for anyone who values efficiency, clarity, and a smooth process, it’s hard to fault. The system does exactly what it promises

review_title: Staff Managment
author: Peter C.
pros: Staff management is remarkably simple because the platform empowers employees through self-service. They can check balances and request leave in seconds via the mobile app, while managers receive instant email or Slack notifications for one-click approvals.
cons: Leave Dates excels at simplicity, its most notable limitation is that it remains a specialized holiday tracker rather than a comprehensive HR.

review_title: Great software!
description: Overall, my experience has been very positive. Leave Dates has improved visibility, reduced admin time, and made leave management much easier.
author: josh W.
pros: What I liked most was how simple and intuitive Leave Dates is. It makes booking, approving, and tracking leave quick and stress free.
cons: The main downside is that reporting options are a bit limited, and some advanced features could be easier to find at first.

review_title: Manager's best friend to manage resource availability
description: My overall experience with Leave Dates has been overwhelmingly positive, particularly for small to medium-sized businesses looking to "retire the spreadsheet." It successfully bridges the gap between a messy manual process and an overly complex HR system.
author: Darsh B.
pros: The "Wall Chart" remains its standout feature. It's very convenient to identify the leave overlaps by the team to understand the resource availability.
cons: It would be highly beneficial for our users if we could allow weekend selection based on the week of the month (e.g., 1st, 2nd, 3rd, or 4th weekend). This functionality would specifically support organizations where employees operate on odd and even weekend shift patterns.

review_title: The Complete Package for Modern LMS.
description: My experience can be summed up in one word it's Clarity. We no longer guess who is in the office or struggle with manual calculations. It has matured our Staff Management and allowed us to focus on our work rather than our calendars.
author: Munaf M.
pros: Zero Learning Curve. All new software comes with a week of training. but not this one. The UI is clean, modern, and "less-click" oriented.
cons: I observed a session issue: if the app is left logged in overnight, the UI becomes completely unresponsive the following day. A hard refresh is required to force the app to route back to the login page.

review_title: User-Friendly and Well Organised
description: My overall experience with Leave Dates has been very good. It’s easy to use, reliable, and makes managing and booking leave simple. It helps keep everything organised and transparent.
author: Noman S.
pros: I liked how easy and clear the system is to use. Booking leave is straightforward, and it’s helpful to see balances and team availability in one place. It saves time and avoids confusion.
cons: There isn’t anything specific I disliked. Overall, the system works well and does what it’s supposed to do.

review_title: Lauren'c Review
description: My overall experience with Leave Dates has been generally positive — it’s convenient for tracking time off and keeping teams organized, though there’s still room for improvement in usability and feature depth.
author: Lauren C.
pros: I like Leave Dates because it makes managing time off simple, transparent, and stress-free for everyone.
cons: I found the platform a bit limited in customization options, and the interface could be more intuitive.

review_title: Leave Dates - our 3rd year of using it!
description: Really good from the start, easy to use and support when needed has been great. Invoicing is easy and downloading reports makes life much easier!
author: Kayleigh P.
pros: That we can keep track of all our staff members in one place. The calendar can be looked at as a whole, we can colour code leave types
cons: That all day lengths are the same. Our staff work between 5 and 10 hour days depending on their shift pattern so each holiday day has to be changed individually

review_title: Seamless and easy to use
description: As above, very pleased and cost-effective. We were looking for something simple that employees would find easy to use.
author: Richard G.
pros: It offers seamless administration and employee management. Easy for not only us managers but employees too!
cons: Honestly, no cons. It's effective in its simplicity. Whilst I've been using it I haven't encountered any bugs. And I cannot attest for somebody with a much bigger team than I.

review_title: Amazing service provided by leave dates
author: Senthil T.
pros: Will get the entire reporting team data in one location and esay to access the details and approval of leaves.
cons: Invidual calender we are receiving but the reporting people's calendars we were not able to see. But we can see all the reporting people's data month wise

review_title: Great system
description: Amazing system which is easy to use. great UI, and seamless connectivity. Amazing customer service and I feel like a valued customer.
author: David F.
pros: It is a simple and intuitive system to use, the UI is easy to navigate and it connects seamlessly to our systems. No complaints. Highly recommend.
cons: That it only covers leave, and not other aspects of the HR process. IT is a great system and should be expanded.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Won’t be leaving any time soon
description: Very good , no complaints at all, the system is very user friendly and easy to navigate which makes booking leave easy
author: Jo F.
pros: It is user friendly and easy to navigate around the system, some other systems I have used have been more complex
cons: Sometimes if you are entering a holiday for A specific purpose eg birthday it defaults to that on next usage

review_title: Easy to learn and use, saves time due to nice features
description: Very easy to use, some automatic features save you a lot of time. Thanks to email notifications I know exactly when somebody is going take a day off and I can plan accordingly without a need of constant checking / logging in.
author: Václav S.
pros: Simple to setup but contains all the much needed features we need in our team. Automatic transfer of not used holidays into next year (based on settings), automatic setup of public holidays, notifications if somebody book holiday, approval mechanisms etc. Also it has nice user friendly design which helps with navigating through the page (you easily find what you are looking for without manual) and browsing pages is fast and efficient. And for 5 employees it´s free. :)
cons: I really cant think of anything even If I try my hardest. :) Maybe extend free plan for more users! :D But fortunately for our small company 5 is enough.

review_title: What a great product!
description: Leave dates has been instrumental in helping us track, manage and get visualisation across our leave when we opened a 2nd office.
author: Neil W.
pros: Leave dates is super easy to use, it was rolled out internally very quickly because it's so user friendly.
cons: Nothing, it does exactly what we'd want it to do. If I had one thing to say it would be to vary the person on the homepage of the website, the guy looks cool but you could switch him up for a couple of others from time to time.
